title: Assistant district attorney
doc_html:
PART VIII. NINTH JUDICIAL DISTRICT

§221. Assistant district attorney

           The office of first assistant district attorney for the Ninth Judicial District is created.

           Amended by Acts 1956, No. 61, §1.
doc_text:
PART VIII.  NINTH JUDICIAL DISTRICT
§221.  Assistant district attorney
The office of first assistant district attorney for the Ninth Judicial
District is created.
Amended by Acts 1956, No. 61, §1.
